case_title: RUSSELL BRIMER VS. THE FAUCET-QUEENS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT TO JUDGMENT AS TO THE FAUCET QUEENS, INCORPORATED IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THE REFORMULATION AND WARNING PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE AND COMPLIANT WITH THE LAW. THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
